scientific_scope: This is a Phase 1 A3 distillation comparator implementation smoke only.

The smoke checks scalp feature extraction, training-only normalization, training-only teacher proxy fitting, teacher-output generation for training rows, student distillation fitting, logits, metrics and artifact writing.
The smoke teacher is an internal scalp-feature proxy, not a final iEEG teacher and not privileged-transfer evidence.
No held-out outer-test subject may participate in normalization, teacher fit, teacher outputs for student fit, student fit, calibration, threshold or tuned QC fitting.
Student inference uses scalp features only and does not consume teacher outputs at test time.
No headline claim is permitted from this smoke output.
